title: どんなカレンがお・す・き？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come to the station on my day off to find one of
its corners particularly colorful.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, this is a great angle. ♪ Don't we both just
look awesome?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! ☆ You're a selfie genius, Curren! ♪ Next,
let's try this pose...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Big Bro? What a coincidence! ♪ Or is it
fate?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Big Sis? What a coincidence! ♪ Or is it
fate?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! It's gotta be fate! ☆ That's crazy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Curren! Let's have your trainer hang out with
us too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? Okay, thanks! Come on, Big Bro,
let's go!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? Okay, thanks! Come on, Big Sis,
let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And before I even know what's happening...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Which photo booth should we do? I don't
really know much about this stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I did the one in the back the other day. You
couldn't really edit the pics, but the photos had
so much sparkle!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay with whatever, but you wanna do a more
natural-looking one, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha. You really know me. ♪ Let's try that one!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That phone case is so cute! It's so glittery! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's so like you—super flashy! ♪ It'd be cool if you
changed your case to match your outfit!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I like that! You're a genius. ☆ I'm gonna get it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We keep walking around together and end up at
Mayano Top Gun's favorite shop.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
They have both fashionable designer clothes and
eccentric clothes that bring out your personality,
so even just looking around is fun. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But today, I'm gonna have you try on a bunch of
things! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Widdle ol' me? Why?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You have your own fashion rules, right? It's cute,
but I wanna see you in something completely
different too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! ☆ Like something fashion-wise you always
do or never ever do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know me so well! ♪ I have a few, like how
much skin I show and how I always wear a mini
skirt.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I do all that to make sure I'm a hundred-percent
cute, so I've never really thought about doing
something else...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... But well, if Big Bro begs me to, I guess I could give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... But well, if Big Sis begs me to, I guess I could give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hooray! ☆ C'mon, tell her to try! ☆

text_block_list.name: Together
text_block_list.text: Come oooon.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Guess I've got no choice. ♪ Sooo...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Would you rather see me in something bold or
something super stylish?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You wanna see me be more bold?
Interesting...
choice_data_list: I didn't mean it like that...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You wanna see me be more bold?
Interesting...
choice_data_list: I didn't mean it like that...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Mhm, sure you didn't. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Something bold... Maybe a harness belt and
some fishnet tights?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe. But something tells me my trainer has a
different kind of boldness in mind. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe. But something tells me my trainer has a
different kind of boldness in mind. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Really? You mean, like... something see-through?! Wh-whoa... Now that's bold.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You should tell me about more shops like this. ☆ I
know you've been looking to try a bolder look for
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What?! You knew?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha. ☆ Wait here, 'kay? I'll go try this outfit on
juuust for you, Big Bro...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha. ☆ Wait here, 'kay? I'll go try this outfit on
juuust for you, Big Sis...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Maybe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan keeps teasing me as we continue
shopping, and it ends up being a mentally and
physically exhausting day.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, so you like a more mature look?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, so you like a more mature look?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So by "stylish," you mean something more
monotone and reserved, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Which means... adults prefer mature women. I
knew it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...All right then, Big Bro. I know what you're
thinking. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...All right then, Big Sis. I know what you're
thinking. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I guess I've gotta teach you the true appeal of
cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I guess I've gotta teach you the true appeal of
cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Cuteness is all around us. It is all-encompassing.
Cuteness... is life. It seems you don't quite get
that yet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Maya, we're gonna have to hit pause on
the shopping. My crash course on cuteness about
to start! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Copy that! ☆ That sounds fun! I wanna take the
lesson too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan starts her lesson. Three, two,
one—Cute Curren Chan!
